examples: He took a vow of chastity and celibacy.
Roman doctrine, of course, had prized the state of celibacy, insisting that it was the superior state over marriage.
Some add celibacy to the charge list.
Depressed by his wife's infertility, Ashok adopts the advice of a spiritual guru and embraces celibacy.
Taken in its strictest definition, there is a question mark over whether celibacy is possible.
